title: Clientside Crafting
description: A mod that fixes crafting table server lag by predicting crafting table results on the client.
body:
# Clientside Crafting

This mod removes lag in the crafting menu caused by waiting for the server to respond. it does this by predicting crafting table results clientside.

This mod is clientside only!

## Specifics

- Fixes crafting menus that open without usable level access.
- Uses the local recipe manager to show the result before the server sends it.
- Respects recipe book state, feature flags, and the limited crafting gamerule.
